narrative:
Fairview Park-01-A (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 946 registered voters, with 51.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 26.0%, a modest Democratic lean of 3.4 percentage points.
